sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.taskName,s.stageName,CONCAT(s.stageName,' - ',t.taskName) AS taskLabel FROM tbl_template_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_template_stages s ON s.id=t.templateStageId AND s.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.templateId=:templateId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId AND t.status='active' ORDER BY s.sortOrder,t.sortOrder
